full_text:
Handan Shang 邯鄲商
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Handan Shang (邯鄲商)was born in Chenliu. Inspector of Yong province, killed in a quarrel with Zhang Meng. Handan Shang was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Handan Shang lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
